ddls:
CREATE TABLE "workers" (
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each worker */,
  "worker_name" TEXT /* Full name of the worker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the worker */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the worker (e.g., participant, researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the worker */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the worker */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the worker record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the worker record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("worker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workers_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Hex code or other representation of the color */,
  "percentage_blue" REAL /* Percentage of blue in the color */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the color record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the color record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "confidence_levels" (
  "confidence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each confidence level */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Name of the confidence level (e.g., probably, definitely) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the confidence level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the confidence level record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the confidence level record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("confidence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating (e.g., 0, 1, 2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the rating record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the rating record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worker participating in the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session was conducted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the session record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_sessions_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color test */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session where the test was performed */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color shown */,
  "percentage_blue" REAL /* Percentage of blue in the color */,
  "confidence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the confidence level reported by the worker */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating given by the worker */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the test record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the test record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_tests_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_tests_confidence_id FOREIGN KEY ("confidence_id") REFERENCES confidence_levels ("confidence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_tests_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES color_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_tests_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the researcher is affiliated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the researcher record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the researcher record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., participant, researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
